keyFeatures.zh: 将文件转换为不同格式

description.en: Convert up to 5 files per day, 5MB max file size, no commercial use allowed
description.zh: 每天最多转换5个文件，单个文件最大5MB，不允许商业使用

weaknesses.en: Limited file size and number of conversions for free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐文件大小和转换次数有限制

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses needing basic file conversion
targetAudience.zh: 需要基本文件转换的个人和小型企业

positioning.en: Convertio positions itself as a simple and user-friendly online tool for file conversion
positioning.zh: Convertio 自定位为一个简单易用的在线文件转换工具
